policy_note: Default policy is 90% line coverage per source file. After the larql-compute-metal extraction (ADR-019), this crate is CPU-side only — the trait, the CpuBackend impl, pipeline types, and env-option helpers. Every file is expected to clear the 90% floor without `exclude_globs` hacks. GPU-shader coverage lives in `crates/larql-compute-metal/coverage-policy.json`.
